subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we're glad to hear about the potential synergy between our teams. We'd be happy to explore this further.

Regarding an introductory call, would any of the following slots work for you?
- Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which time suits you best.

Regarding your request for internal contact information and phone numbers — I'm unable to share internal directory details or personnel contact information. For publicly available contact options, please refer to our website.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
